title: T. rex Storm — Through the Rain
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex emerging through heavy rain and lightning, dramatic ground-level angle capturing the full scale of the apex predator.
description: T. rex Storm — Through the Rain: a paleoart fine-art print of Tyrannosaurus rex advancing through a torrential Late Cretaceous downpour. Lightning fractures the sky behind the apex predator as rain obscures the horizon — a ground-level perspective that emphasizes the full terrifying scale of the animal. Museum-quality dinosaur wall art for collectors, natural history enthusiasts, and fans of dramatic prehistoric wildlife photography.
caption: Tyrannosaurus rex advances through a torrential Late Cretaceous downpour — ground-level perspective captures the full scale of the apex predator in this cinematic paleoart print.

title: T. rex Storm — Lightning Strike
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex caught in a dramatic lightning storm, ground-level angle with rain and electric light illuminating the apex predator.
description: T. rex Storm — Lightning Strike: a cinematic paleoart print capturing Tyrannosaurus rex in a violent Late Cretaceous storm. Ground-level perspective, driving rain, and a lightning bolt silhouetting the apex predator against a bruised sky. Museum-quality dinosaur wall art rendered with hyper-realistic detail — for collectors, paleontology enthusiasts, and anyone who wants raw prehistoric power on their wall.
caption: Tyrannosaurus rex stands in a violent Late Cretaceous storm — lightning illuminates the apex predator from ground level in this cinematic paleoart print.

title: Tyrannosaurus rex vs. Triceratops
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex seizing a Triceratops in a muddy river delta at golden hour — two Late Cretaceous giants locked in combat, rendered as hyper-realistic wildlife photography.
description: Tyrannosaurus rex vs. Triceratops — a fine-art paleoart print capturing the apex predator of the Late Cretaceous lunging at a horned Triceratops in the shallows of a primeval river delta, dust and water flying in low golden light. Two of the most iconic dinosaurs of the Hell Creek world, rendered with scientific accuracy and the intimacy of modern wildlife photography. Museum-quality dinosaur wall art for collectors, paleontology enthusiasts, and anyone who wants the lost world on their wall.
caption: A Tyrannosaurus rex clashes with a Triceratops in the muddy shallows of a Late Cretaceous river delta — two icons of the Hell Creek world captured like modern wildlife photography.

Stegosaurus — fine-art paleoart print depicting Stegosaurus stenops, plated herbivore with dorsal plates and a thagomizer tail, native to the Late Jurassic.
